data.body: PROGRESS: epic dc09 claimed (in_progress, assignee joe-identity-rollout). Pre-flight CONFIRMED: AWS SSM /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key decrypts to an OpenSSH ed25519 private key whose public half EXACTLY matches identity 594c's registered key (ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3...M2F8b). So both local (79da) and CI (4dc0) signing will verify against 594c. All 5 story plans remediated to review criteria (fixed a real proving-command defect: verify-identity JSON report EXCLUDES verified events — prove signing by ABSENCE of the event uuid from the non-verified report, not by filtering verdict==verified). Plan-reviews launched for 79da/4dc0/1a51/8d91; 8d39 held for last.
